center.name: 克拉斯诺达尔边疆区
center.summary: 克拉斯诺达尔边疆区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Krüper's nuthatch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Krüper's nuthatch is found in pine and other coniferous forests in Turkey, Lesbos (Greece), and in the western Caucasus mountains in Georgia and Krasnodar Krai and Karachay-Cherkessia (southern Russia), largely following the distribution of Turkish pine (Pinus brutia)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Krüper's nuthatch is found in pine and other coniferous forests in Turkey, Lesbos (Greece), and in the western Caucasus mountains in Georgia and Krasnodar Krai and Karachay-Cherkessia (southern Russia), largely following the distribution of Turkish pine (Pinus brutia)
